# Feature List

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/quickStart/featureList`
- Source markdown path: `/src/docs/quickStart/featureList/en.md`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/en-CLTKVqGD.js`

## Content (HTML)

<h1 id="feature-list" tabindex="-1">Feature List</h1>
<hr>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-1">
<ul>
<li>Supports text prompts (including positive and negative)</li>
<li>Supports uploading reference images and customizing the reference strength</li>
<li>Supports setting the aspect ratio of the generated images (width: height)</li>
<li>Supports generating multiple images in a single request</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-2">
<ul>
<li>Supports querying task status and results by single task ID</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-3">
<ul>
<li>Supports querying the status and results of all tasks</li>
<li>Supports querying with pagination</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-4">
<ul>
<li>Supports specifying a callback URL when creating a task</li>
<li>Supports proactive callback when the task status changes</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-5">
<ul>
<li>Supports text prompts (including positive and negative)</li>
<li>Supports customizing the reference&amp;creativity strength</li>
<li>Supports different generation modes <ul>
<li>Standard Mode：the basic mode, which is cost-effective</li>
<li>Professional Mode：with high performance, better generation quality</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Supports camera control <ul>
<li>Basic camera movement：6 options -Master shot：4 options</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Supports setting the aspect ratio of the generated videos (width: height)</li>
<li>Supports setting the generated video length</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-9">
<ul>
<li>Supports text prompts (including positive and negative)</li>
<li>Supports uploading reference images</li>
<li>Supports uploading Start/End Frames</li>
<li>Supports customizing the reference&amp;creativity strength</li>
<li>Supports different generation modes <ul>
<li>Standard Mode：with high efficiency, faster generation speed</li>
<li>Professional Mode：with high performance, better generation quality</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Supports setting the generated video length</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-10">
<ul>
<li>Supports text prompts (including positive and negative)</li>
<li>Supports uploading reference images（multiple）</li>
<li>Supports customizing the reference&amp;creativity strength</li>
<li>Supports different generation modes <ul>
<li>Standard Mode：with high efficiency, faster generation speed</li>
<li>Professional Mode：with high performance, better generation quality</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Supports setting the generated video length</li>
<li>Supports setting the aspect ratio of the generated images (width: height)</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-13">
<ul>
<li>Supports uploading generated video task IDs</li>
<li>Supports text prompts (positive prompt only)</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-17">
<ul>
<li>It can achieve mouth shape matching based on audio, and the audio can be obtained through the “TTS” API</li>
<li>Supports direct cropping of uploaded audio</li>
<li>Supports specifying the start time for mouth shape matching</li>
<li>Supports adjusting the original video volume size</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-21">
<ul>
<li>Supports uploading reference image of model</li>
<li>Supports uploading reference image of clothing</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-22">
<ul>
<li>Supports the designation of video effect scenes and allows for the input of different parameters according to the various scenes</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-23">
<ul>
<li>Supports text prompts</li>
<li>Supports setting the generated audio length</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-24">
<ul>
<li>Supports specifying Kling AI generated video IDs</li>
<li>Supports specifying links for uploaded videos</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-25">
<ul>
<li>Supports multiple subject reference images</li>
<li>Supports scene reference image</li>
<li>Supports style reference image</li>
<li>Supports text prompts (including positive and negative)</li>
<li>Supports setting the aspect ratio of the generated images (width: height)</li>
<li>Supports generating multiple images in a single request</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-26">
<ul>
<li>Supports free proportional expansion of images</li>
<li>Supports generating multiple images in a single request</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-27">
<ul>
<li>Video can be provided in multiple ways through video ID or video URL</li>
<li>Supports interaction through session ID without repeatedly providing videos</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-28">
<ul>
<li>Intelligent addition of selection area through coordinate based on frame number</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-29">
<ul>
<li>Intelligent deletion of selection area through coordinate based on frame number</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-30">
<ul>
<li>Clear all added video selections</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-31">
<ul>
<li>The selection results can be presented through a complete video to ensure the accuracy of the selection</li>
<li>This step is not mandatory and does not affect the video effect</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-32">
<ul>
<li>Supports add, delete, and replace elements within the video</li>
<li>Supports text prompts (including positive and negative)</li>
<li>Supports different generation modes <ul>
<li>Standard Mode：with high efficiency, faster generation speed</li>
<li>Professional Mode：with high performance, better generation quality</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Supports setting the generated video length</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-33">
<ul>
<li>Custom digital character images, supporting cartoon style, animal, and more</li>
<li>Supports text prompts (including positive and negative)</li>
<li>Supports different generation modes <ul>
<li>Standard Mode：with high efficiency, faster generation speed</li>
<li>Professional Mode：with high performance, better generation quality</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-34">
<ul>
<li>Identify faces based on videos and provide the best timing for matching mouth shapes</li>
<li>When there are multiple faces in the video, it support specifying the face of lip-sync</li>
<li>Supports interaction through session ID without repeatedly providing videos</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-35">
<ul>
<li>Supports quickly identify elements such as subjects, faces, clothing, etc. in images</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-36">
<ul>
<li>Supports generate audio with specified tone based on text</li>
<li>Supports setting the speed of speech</li>
</ul>
</div>

faster generation speed</li><li>Professional Mode：with high performance, better generation quality</li></ul></li></ul></div><div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-34"><ul><li>Identify faces based on videos and provide the best timing for matching mouth shapes</li><li>When there are multiple faces in the video, it support specifying the face of lip-sync</li><li>Supports interaction through session ID without repeatedly providing videos</li></ul></div><div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-35"><ul><li>Supports quickly identify elements such as subjects, faces, clothing, etc. in images</li></ul></div><div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="fl-36"><ul><li>Supports generate audio with specified tone
